title: Magnetium
description: A mod that adds magnets and their components to Minecraft.
body: This mod adds magnets and their components to Minecraft. It's a very vanilla-friendly mod that allows players to collect dropped items within a specific range. For now, only the version compatible with 1.21.11 is available. However, you can find the source code for all versions from 1.21 to 1.21.11 in the GitHub repository.
